Test name: CMCrossing -50 % (ego 30 km/h)

Test Description

The situation of accident is represented by the VUT and the AMT driving straight and perpendicularly at an intersection.

  • Regulation or protocol: ASEAN NCAP
  • Ego speed: 30 km/h
  • Target speed: 20 km/h
  • Overlap between both vehicles: -50%
